2376,ReleaseEvent,2015-05-25 15:05:25+00:00,32323260,dmnfarrell/pandastable,7859189,dmnfarrell,,,published,v0.2.0,v0.2.0,"This is an alpha release. Includes a download of the windows binary version of the DataExplore application that comes with this library in the form of an MSI installer.
* Added dataframe index display in row header
* Added hexbin, pie and area plots
* Enable using the requirements packaging functionality alone, without the WSGI handler. This is enabled by omitting the `custom.wsgi.app` setting from `serverless.yml`.

* If no `requirements.txt` file is present and the WSGI handler is enabled, make sure to package werkzeug."

5391,ReleaseEvent,2016-10-12 13:09:07+00:00,30509483,clab/dynet,398875,neubig,2374376,clab,published,v1.0-rc1,First release candidate for v1.0,This is the first release candidate for DyNet version 1.0.
Compared to the previous (cnn)[https://github.com/clab/cnn-v1], it supports a number of new features:
- Added the ability for subscriber to batch requests. (#4895)
- Added pending request backpressure for subscriber. (#4892)
- Raise `ValueError` when a message is too large for a batch. (#4872)
- Updated the default batch size to 10 MB. (#4857)
- Allow a custom `Event` type in Pub / Sub futures. (#4643)
- Fix unit test for default `max_bytes` value. (#4860)"

Pooch will manage downloading your sample data files over HTTP from a server and storing them in a local directory:
* Download a file only if it's not in the local storage.
* Check the SHA256 hash to make sure the file is not corrupted or needs updating.
* If the hash is different from the registry, Pooch will download a new version of the file.
* If the hash still doesn't match, Pooch will raise an exception warning of possible data corruption.
* Add raster bands methods to metadata service.
* Add require_bands param to derived bands search method.
* Test suite replaces original token when finished running script tests."
